 {"id":"bd-8534","title":"Switch from modernc.org/sqlite to ncruces/go-sqlite3 for WASM support","description":"modernc.org/sqlite depends on modernc.org/libc which has no js/wasm support (platform-specific syscalls). Need to switch to ncruces/go-sqlite3 which wraps a WASM build of SQLite using wazero runtime.

Key differences:
- ncruces/go-sqlite3: Uses WASM build of SQLite + wazero runtime
- modernc.org/sqlite: Pure Go translation, requires libc for syscalls

This is a prerequisite for bd-62a0 (WASM build infrastructure).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T22:14:27.627154-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-02T22:23:49.377223-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-02T22:23:49.377223-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-8534","depends_on_id":"bd-44d0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T22:23:49.555691-08:00","created_by":"stevey"}]}

 {"id":"bd-87a0","title":"Publish @beads/bd package to npm registry","description":"Publish the npm package to the public npm registry:

## Prerequisites
- npm account created
- Organization @beads created (or use different namespace)
- npm login completed locally
- Package tested locally (bd-f282 completed)

## Publishing steps
1. Verify package.json version matches current bd version
2. Run npm pack and inspect tarball contents
3. Test installation from tarball one more time
4. Run npm publish --access public
5. Verify package appears on https://www.npmjs.com/package/@beads/bd
6. Test installation from registry: npm install -g @beads/bd

## Post-publish
- Add npm badge to README.md
- Update CHANGELOG.md with npm package release
- Announce in release notes

## Note
- May need to choose different name if @beads namespace unavailable
- Alternative: beads-cli, bd-cli, or unscoped beads-issue-tracker","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:25.263569-08:00","updated_at":"2025-11-03T10:39:41.772338-08:00","closed_at":"2025-11-03T10:39:41.772338-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-87a0","depends_on_id":"bd-febc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-11-02T23:40:33.014043-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
